name: Help Scout
description: Help Scout is a customer support platform built around shared email inboxes. The Mailbox API lets you manage conversations, customers, mailboxes, users, teams, tags, workflows, webhooks, and access detailed reports.

capabilities.name: conversations_list
capabilities.description: List all conversations across mailboxes with filtering by status, assignee, tag, and date.

capabilities.name: conversations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific conversation by ID with all its details.

capabilities.name: conversations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new conversation in a mailbox with an initial thread.

capabilities.name: conversations_update
capabilities.description: Update a conversation's status, assignee, or subject.

capabilities.name: conversations_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a conversation.

capabilities.name: threads_list
capabilities.description: List all threads in a conversation.

capabilities.name: threads_create_reply
capabilities.description: Send a reply to a conversation. The reply is delivered to the customer via email.

capabilities.name: threads_create_note
capabilities.description: Add an internal note to a conversation visible only to agents.

capabilities.name: conversations_update_tags
capabilities.description: Update the tags on a conversation.

capabilities.name: conversations_update_custom_fields
capabilities.description: Update custom field values on a conversation.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List all customers with their contact information.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific customer by ID.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new customer profile.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update a customer's profile information.

capabilities.name: customers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a customer by ID.

capabilities.name: mailboxes_list
capabilities.description: List all mailboxes (shared inboxes) in your account.

capabilities.name: mailboxes_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific mailbox by ID.

capabilities.name: mailboxes_folders_list
capabilities.description: List all folders in a mailbox.

capabilities.name: mailboxes_custom_fields_list
capabilities.description: List custom fields configured for a mailbox.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in your Help Scout account.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific user by ID.

capabilities.name: users_me
capabilities.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's profile.

capabilities.name: teams_list
capabilities.description: List all teams in your account.

capabilities.name: teams_members_list
capabilities.description: List all members of a specific team.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: List all tags in your Help Scout account.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhook subscriptions.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook subscription for event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: workflows_list
capabilities.description: List all workflows in your account.

capabilities.name: workflows_run
capabilities.description: Run a manual workflow on specified conversations.

capabilities.name: workflows_update_status
capabilities.description: Activate or deactivate a workflow.

capabilities.name: reports_company
capabilities.description: Retrieve overall company performance report for a date range.

capabilities.name: reports_conversations
capabilities.description: Retrieve conversation statistics report.

capabilities.name: reports_productivity
capabilities.description: Retrieve productivity metrics including first response and resolution times.

capabilities.name: reports_happiness
capabilities.description: Retrieve customer satisfaction (happiness) ratings report.

capabilities.name: organizations_list
capabilities.description: List all organizations.

capabilities.name: organizations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific organization by ID.

capabilities.name: organizations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new organization.

capabilities.name: organizations_update
capabilities.description: Update an organization.

capabilities.name: organizations_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an organization.

capabilities.name: saved_replies_list
capabilities.description: List all saved replies for a mailbox.
